mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS(',', '种鸽数量', '乳鸽数量', '鸽蛋数量', '鸽蛋总产量')) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS(',', number_of_breeding_pairs, number_of_poultry, number_of_eggs, total_egg_production)) AS numbers FROM base_greenhouse UNION ALL SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS(',', '大棚温度', '大棚湿度')) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS(',', temperature, humidity)) AS numbers FROM temperature_data UNION ALL SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS name, GROUP_CONCAT(numbers) AS numbers FROM incubation_record;
mapper.update:
UPDATE base_greenhouse
number_of_breeding_pairs = #{numberOfBreedingPairs},
number_of_poultry = #{numberOfPoultry},
number_of_eggs = #{numberOfEggs},
total_egg_production = #{totalEggProduction}
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(f.numbers1, 0) ORDER BY q.quarter_sort) AS numbers1, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(e.numbers2, 0) ORDER BY q.quarter_sort) AS numbers2, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(e.numbers3, 0) ORDER BY q.quarter_sort) AS numbers3, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(e.numbers4, 0) ORDER BY q.quarter_sort) AS numbers4, '第一季度,第二季度,第三季度,第四季度' AS quarters FROM ( SELECT 1 as quarter_sort UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(out_gove) AS numbers1, QUARTER(time) AS quarter_num FROM farm WHERE YEAR(time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND name = '乳鸽' GROUP BY quarter_num ) f ON q.quarter_sort = f.quarter_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN name = '未受精' THEN sum ELSE 0 END) AS numbers2, SUM(CASE WHEN name = '单蛋' THEN sum ELSE 0 END) AS numbers3, SUM(CASE WHEN name = '坏蛋' THEN sum ELSE 0 END) AS numbers4, QUARTER(time) AS quarter_num FROM pigeon_egg_status WHERE YEAR(time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY quarter_num ) e ON q.quarter_sort = e.quarter_num;
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(`range` SEPARATOR ',') AS `range`, GROUP_CONCAT(numbers SEPARATOR ',') AS numbers FROM pigeon_age_steps;
